nodes.name: Generation Request Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggered by the FlowCore frontend AI builder. Receives: business_id, business_name, business_category, user_prompt, custom_description, llama_endpoint (optional), model (optional).

nodes.name: Fetch FlowCore Runtime Context
nodes.notes: Fetches the versioned FlowCore runtime context document (flowcore_runtime_context_v1.md) dynamically from the backend. This ensures Llama always has the latest module contracts, FSM rules, and workflow patterns.

nodes.name: Fetch Business Metadata
nodes.notes: Fetches the business profile (name, catalog, settings, branding) to inject into the AI prompt for business-aware workflow generation.

nodes.name: Build Intent Extraction Prompt
nodes.notes: Step 1 of 2-pass generation: builds a lightweight intent extraction prompt to classify: payment needed, delivery needed, appointment system, business-specific terminology. Prevents hallucination in the full generation step.

nodes.name: Llama: Extract Intent
nodes.notes: Pass 1: Fast intent classification call to Llama/Ollama. 8 second timeout. Falls back to local heuristics if Llama is offline.

nodes.name: Parse Intent + Fallback
nodes.notes: Parses Llama's intent JSON. Falls back gracefully to local heuristic classifiers if Llama is offline/slow. Always produces a valid intent object.

nodes.name: Build Full Generation Prompt
nodes.notes: Constructs the comprehensive Llama generation prompt combining: runtime context (v1), business metadata, extracted intent, terminology, operational actions, and business-specific requirements. Supports refinement mode for iterative workflow updates.

nodes.name: Llama: Generate Workflow
nodes.notes: Pass 2: Full workflow graph generation. 60 second timeout (graph generation is heavier). Falls back to mock synthesis if Llama unavailable.

nodes.name: Parse Generated Workflow
nodes.notes: Extracts valid JSON from Llama's response. Falls back to intent-aware mock synthesis if Llama is offline or returns invalid JSON. Mock synthesis respects payment/delivery/appointment intent flags.

nodes.name: FlowCore: Validate Workflow
nodes.notes: MANDATORY: All generated workflows pass through FlowCore's validation pipeline before storage. FlowCore checks: DAG cycle-freedom, FSM legality, module contracts, edge conditions, dead-end detection.

nodes.name: FlowCore: Register Workflow
nodes.notes: Registers the validated workflow as a new DRAFT version in FlowCore. Returns version_id for compilation.

nodes.name: FlowCore: Compile Workflow
nodes.notes: Compiles the registered workflow version. FlowCore performs: graph compilation, node resolution, edge optimization, FSM table generation, and readiness certification.

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "workflow_graph": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Parse Generated Workflow'].json.workflow_graph) }},
  "version_id": "{{ $node['FlowCore: Register Workflow'].json.data.id }}",
  "compile_status": "{{ $json.data?.certified ? 'CERTIFIED' : 'COMPILED' }}",
  "using_mock": {{ $node['Parse Generated Workflow'].json.using_mock }},
  "intent": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Parse Generated Workflow'].json.intent) }},
  "message": "Workflow generated, validated, and compiled successfully."
}

nodes.name: Respond: Success
nodes.notes: Returns the complete workflow graph, version_id, compile status, and intent metadata to the frontend AI builder.

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": false,
  "error": "Workflow validation failed",
  "validation_report": {{ JSON.stringify($json.data) }},
  "workflow_graph": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Parse Generated Workflow'].json.workflow_graph) }},
  "message": "The generated workflow failed FlowCore validation. See validation_report for details."
}

nodes.name: Respond: Validation Failed
nodes.notes: Returns the validation report so the frontend can display specific errors and prompt the user to refine their request.
